calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73302615 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"if [ -x .venv/bin/fedcourts ]; then .venv/bin/fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73302615 --event evt-petition-disposition; else rg --files data/cases/scotus/73302615; fi","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg --files data/cases/scotus/73302615 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg --files -g 'context.json' -g 'documents.json' -g '*snapshot*' -g 'record/**' . | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find . -path '*/record/context.json' -o -path '*/record/documents.json' -o -iname '*snapshot*' | sort | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73302615/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && find data/cases/scotus/73302615/record -maxdepth 3 -type f -printf '%p %s bytes\\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73302615/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":15000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73302615/record/documents/documents.json && sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73302615/record/documents/questions-presented.txt && wc -l data/cases/scotus/73302615/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,400p' data/cases/scotus/73302615/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '401,800p' data/cases/scotus/73302615/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '801,1200p' data/cases/scotus/73302615/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1201,1516p' data/cases/scotus/73302615/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '1,80p' data/cases/scotus/73302615/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate by salience|relist|CVSG|D.C. Circuit|fee|Paid|Term\" metrics/statpack.md | head -100","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,175p' metrics/statpack.md && rg -n 'salience' metrics/statpack.md metrics/statpack.json | head -50","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") and (.term == \"2025\"))' metrics/statpack.json | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.terms, (.sections | keys)' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);
const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:".venv/bin/fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output);
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|case law|docket/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73302615/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output);

const patch = "*** Begin Patch

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73302615/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output);
